facade_description: 185 Augusta Ave presents a converted house-form, detached facade within the Kensington Market HCD. The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 3 storeys and is capped by a cross-gable, consistent with its converted house-form, detached typology. The facade reads primarily as mixed, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The facade is organized as a storefront base with 2 upper-window bays and 1 additional bay above, using double-hung sash windows, and 1 principal entrance. Character-defining facade elements include bay window, original windows. HCD note: The property has value as a nineteenth-century House-form building that has been modified to accommodate a commercial conversion through a one-storey commercial addition. Through its construction date and typology, the property is associated with the District’s early residential development from the
